sections.paragraph:
ὑγιαίνω (ὑ˘γιαίνω,)
Etym. ὑγιής

1. to be sound, healthy or in health, Lat. bene valere, Hdt., Ar., etc.

2. to be sound of mind, Theogn., Ar., etc.; τὰς φρένας ὑγ. Hdt.

3. of soundness in political or religious opinion, τὸ ὑγιαῖνον τῆς Ἑλλάδος Hdt.

ὑγιαίνω
Etym. ὑγιής

1. to be sound, healthy or in health, Lat. bene valere, Hdt., Ar., etc.

2. to be sound of mind, Theogn., Ar., etc.; τὰς φρένας ὑγ. Hdt.

3. of soundness in political or religious opinion, τὸ ὑγιαῖνον τῆς Ἑλλάδος Hdt.
